# remnawave_keygen (Data Source)

Returns the panel's public key for node setup.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_keygen" "pubkey" {}

output "panel_public_key" {
  value     = data.remnawave_keygen.pubkey.pub_key
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `pub_key` (String, Sensitive) Panel public key.
